task_completion.description: Create a clinical note for Thomas DUBOIS with the correct ALERT title and lab details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the screenshots, look for the MedinTux interface for patient Thomas DUBOIS. A note should be created with a title starting with 'ALERT: Potassium'. The body of the note must contain the test name (Potassium), value (6.2), unit (mmol/L), and normal range.

task_completion.description: Create a clinical note for Sophie LEROY with the correct Lab title and lab details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the screenshots, look for the MedinTux interface for patient Sophie LEROY. A note should be created with a title starting with 'Lab: Ferritin'. The body of the note must contain the test name (Ferritin), value (45), unit (ng/mL), and normal range.

task_completion.description: Create a clinical note for Lucas MOREAU with the correct Lab title and lab details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the screenshots, look for the MedinTux interface for patient Lucas MOREAU. A note should be created with a title starting with 'Lab: Glucose'. The body of the note must contain the test name (Glucose), value (0.95), unit (g/L), and normal range.

task_completion.description: Create a clinical note for Emma PETIT with the correct ALERT title and lab details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the screenshots, look for the MedinTux interface for patient Emma PETIT. A note should be created with a title starting with 'ALERT: Hemoglobin'. The body of the note must contain the test name (Hemoglobin), value (8.1), unit (g/dL), and normal range.

integrity.description: The agent used the MedinTux graphical user interface to create the clinical notes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the MedinTux application open and being interacted with (e.g., clicking on patient records, typing in the note editor).

integrity.description: The agent opened or read the incoming_labs.txt file to obtain the lab results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the file '~/Documents/incoming_labs.txt' being opened in a text editor or its contents displayed in a terminal using commands like 'cat'.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to bypass the GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal commands executing Python, bash, or SQL scripts to directly insert the notes into the MedinTux database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient 1: Thomas DUBOIS (DOB 1980-05-12) - Potassium 6.2 mmol/L (HIGH) -> Title must start with 'ALERT:'.
